creator: lx@redundancy.redundancy.org
text:
On Wed, Jul 04, 2007 at 08:58:39AM -0400, Jason E. Hale wrote:
> Well, that was silly of me; not actually installing the PORTDOCS.
> Simplify WWW while I'm here.
> Package builds fine, NOPORTDOCS works, portlint(1) is happy, 
> I'm happy, everyone is happy!

Even me. Committed with changes - the path to the default theme wasn't
honoring PREFIX, so I put in an extra sed.
